scripts.build: pnpm --filter @pretable-internal/text-core build && pnpm --filter @pretable-internal/layout-core build && pnpm --filter @pretable-internal/grid-core build && tsc -b
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @pretable-internal/text-core build && pnpm --filter @pretable-internal/layout-core build && pnpm --filter @pretable-internal/grid-core build && vitest run --passWithNoTests
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @pretable-internal/text-core build && pnpm --filter @pretable-internal/layout-core build && pnpm --filter @pretable-internal/grid-core build && tsc -b --pretty false
